headline: Lilly-backed Absci banks $100m to progress endometriosis, hair loss therapy
summary: Amid the debut of positive Phase I data, the biotech will push its lead asset further down the clinical pipeline in endometriosis and pattern hair loss.

headline: Absci (ABSI) Is Up 37.8% After ABS-201 Data And Equity Raise - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Earlier this week, Absci Corporation reported encouraging interim Phase 1 data from its HEADLINE trial of ABS-201 for androgenetic alopecia, showing favorable safety, an estimated half-life of at least 65 days, and progression into a multiple ascending dose stage. On the heels of these results, Absci also completed a roughly US$100.00 million follow-on equity offering backed by Eli Lilly & Company and other institutional investors, underscoring external confidence in the ABS-201 program...

content.title: Absci (ABSI) Is Up 37.8% After ABS-201 Data And Equity Raise - Has The Bull Case Changed?
content.summary: Earlier this week, Absci Corporation reported encouraging interim Phase 1 data from its HEADLINE trial of ABS-201 for androgenetic alopecia, showing favorable safety, an estimated half-life of at least 65 days, and progression into a multiple ascending dose stage. On the heels of these results, Absci also completed a roughly US$100.00 million follow-on equity offering backed by Eli Lilly & Company and other institutional investors, underscoring external confidence in the ABS-201 program...

headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) Acquires Centessa Pharmaceuticals to Advance Orexin Receptor 2 Agonists
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) is one of the best stocks for beginners to buy now. headline: Lilly's Jaypirca (pirtobrutinib) recommended by CHMP for approval in the European Union for adults with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) across all lines of therapy
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) today announced that the European Medicines Agency's (EMA) Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) has issued a positive opinion for Jaypirca (pirtobrutinib), a non-covalent Bruton tyrosine kinase (BTK) inhibitor, for the treatment of adults with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) across all lines of therapy and regardless of prior BTK inhibitor treatment. headline: Is Charles River (CRL) Quietly Redefining Its Moat Through Lilly’s AI-Driven TuneLab Collaboration?
summary: In June 2026, Eli Lilly’s Lilly TuneLab announced a collaboration under which Charles River Laboratories will provide standardized nonclinical testing services to AI/ML-enabled biotech companies using the TuneLab drug discovery platform. This collaboration ties Charles River more closely into Lilly’s Catalyze360 ecosystem, potentially deepening its role in data-rich, AI-enhanced preclinical research workflows. We’ll now examine how Charles River’s deeper integration into Lilly’s AI-driven...
